package rulefixtures

// scenario for unnecessary_map_for_set_of_ints: `map[int]bool` or `map[int]struct{}` used as a set for small dense integer ranges
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule691PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario691Positive(records []Rule691PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
